build.buildCommand: mkdir -p data && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq tippecanoe python3-pip && npm install -g pmtiles && npm install && curl -sL -o data/indicadores.gpkg "${GPKG_URL:-https://github.com/bitsandbricks/NIDO_app/releases/download/v1/indicadores.gpkg}" && python3 -m pip install -q --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt && python3 scripts/prepare_data.py && npm run build
